title: Serene: Datapack
description: Datapack containing changes utilized in the Serene modpack
body:
# Serene Datapack
This datapack contains different fixes, features, & tweaks that are used within the [Serene Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/serene).

## Current Features
### Recipes

<details>
<summary>Beds and Sleeping Bags</summary>

Added support for [Handcrafted](https://modrinth.com/mod/handcrafted) to resolve a recipe conflict with [Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack).

![Bed Recipe](https://github.com/Bruhnanza/serene/blob/main/other/recipes/bed.gif?raw=true) ![Sleeping Bag Recipe](https://github.com/Bruhnanza/serene/blob/main/other/recipes/sleeping_bag.gif?raw=true)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Charged Charms</summary>

![Regeneration Charm Recipe](https://github.com/Bruhnanza/serene/blob/main/other/recipes/charged_regen_charm.png?raw=true) ![Speed Charm Recipe](https://github.com/Bruhnanza/serene/blob/main/other/recipes/charged_speed_charm.png?raw=true)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Saddles</summary>

![Saddle Recipe](https://github.com/Bruhnanza/serene/blob/main/other/recipes/saddle.png?raw=true)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Shulker Boxes</summary>

![Shulker Box Recipe](https://github.com/Bruhnanza/serene/blob/main/other/recipes/shulker.png?raw=true) ![Dyed Shulker Boxes Recipe](https://github.com/Bruhnanza/serene/blob/main/other/recipes/shulker_dyed.gif?raw=true)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Smelting Raw Ore Blocks</summary>

![Raw Copper Block Smelting](https://github.com/Bruhnanza/serene/blob/main/other/recipes/raw_copper.png?raw=true) ![Raw Gold Block Smelting](https://github.com/Bruhnanza/serene/blob/main/other/recipes/raw_gold.png?raw=true) ![Raw Iron Block Smelting](https://github.com/Bruhnanza/serene/blob/main/other/recipes/raw_iron.png?raw=true)
</details>
<details>
<summary>Traveler's Backpack Upgrades</summary>

![Blank Upgrade Recipe](https://github.com/Bruhnanza/serene/blob/main/other/recipes/blank_upgrade.png?raw=true) ![Crafting Upgrade Recipe](https://github.com/Bruhnanza/serene/blob/main/other/recipes/crafting_upgrade.png?raw=true)
</details>

### New Enchantments

<details>
<summary>Burning Thorns</summary>

When attacked while wearing equipment with this enchantment, your attackers will receive thorns damage and set ablaze.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Education</summary>

Increases the experience you gain from killing mobs with this enchantment.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Wind Aspect</summary>

Arrows you shoot with this enchantment will spawn a wind charge upon impact with stronger bursts the higher the level.
</details>

### Tweaks

<details>
<summary>Axolotls</summary>
Axolotls will no longer attack friendly mobs, and will instead attack the mobs listed below. In addition, the selection of food used to feed and breed Axolotls has been expanded.
<details>
<summary>Targeted Mobs</summary>

- Drowned
- Guardian & Elder Guardians
- Pufferfish
- Slimes
- Spiders & Cave Spiders
- Silverfish
- Endermites
- Bees
</details>
<details>
<summary>Food Items</summary>

- Tropical Fish Bucket
- Tropical Fish
- Spider Eyes
- Fermented Spider Eyes
- Slime Balls
- [Jello](https://modrinth.com/mod/useful-slime)
</details>

</details>
<details>
<summary>Breaking Blocks</summary>

- Budding amethyst blocks will drop when broken with a tool that has Silk Touch.
- Light source blocks and glass blocks have been added to the pickaxe `mineable` tag, allowing them to be mined faster.
- Cactus and froglights have been added to the hoe `mineable` tag, allowing them to be broken faster.
</details>
<details>
<summary>Enchantments</summary>


- Chiseled bookshelves now provide power to an enchant table.
- The Dark Enchanter & Table upgrade from [Dark Enchanting](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-enchanting) are no longer craftable, and the upgrade can be found in Stronghold libraries.
- The Soulbond enchantment from the mod [You're in Grave Danger](https://modrinth.com/mod/yigd) now supports more items like Shulker Boxes, Bundles, [Traveler's Backpacks](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack), and more!
</details>

### Support or Issues?
If you encounter any issues or wish to give feedback, please submit them to the GitHub.
